use_cases: Accepting terms and conditions in sign-up or registration forms
Toggling user preferences and settings in account dashboards
Selecting multiple items in filtering systems or product catalogs
Enabling or disabling feature flags in admin panels
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible checkbox component built with Ark UI featuring dark mode support, smooth state transitions, and a clean flat design. Uses Lucide icons for the checkmark indicator and integrates seamlessly with Tailwind CSS for styling customization.
